name: Cinnamon 12x24 Horse Paddock Plan - A Dual-Bay Run-In Shelter for Horses & Livestock
open_features: The extended lean-to roof provides generous coverage for multiple horses, making it ideal for shared turnout and feeding zones.
Open front access with internal division creates comfortable, side-by-side shelter areas that reduce crowding and promote calm use.
Rear and side walls help block prevailing wind and weather while maintaining ventilation and a stress-free environment.
Straightforward post-and-beam framing with clean lines makes this plan accessible for DIY builders, ranch owners, and professionals.
description_summary: Kickstart your pasture upgrade with the Cinnamon Horse Paddock Plan - a 12x24 run-in shelter thoughtfully designed to provide shared protection, comfort, and structure for horses in open paddock environments. Featuring a clean single-slope roof, sturdy timber framing, and partial side and rear walls, Cinnamon offers dependable shelter from sun, wind, and rain while preserving excellent airflow and visibility. Whether you're building a two-horse run-in, feeding and watering station, or a durab...
